nodes.name: 0058_wealthy_starbolt.sql
nodes.summary: Adds liveness tracking columns (liveness_state, liveness_reason, continuation_attempt, last_useful_action_at, next_action) to the heartbeat_runs table and creates a supporting btree index for company-scoped liveness queries.

nodes.name: 0059_plugin_database_namespaces.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the plugin_database_namespaces and plugin_migrations tables, enabling plugins to manage their own isolated database namespaces and track migration history with status, checksums, and versioning.

nodes.name: plugin_database_namespaces
nodes.summary: Stores plugin-owned database namespace registrations, tracking namespace name, mode, and lifecycle status per plugin.

nodes.name: plugin_migrations
nodes.summary: Tracks migration files applied to plugin database namespaces, including checksum, plugin version, status, and error messages for safe idempotent migration management.

nodes.name: 0060_orange_annihilus.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the issue_reference_mentions table, which records cross-issue reference detection (source/target issue pairs, mention context, and document key), with unique constraints to prevent duplicate mention records.

nodes.name: issue_reference_mentions
nodes.summary: Stores detected cross-issue reference mentions, linking source and target issues with context about where and how the reference appeared (document key, matched text, source record).

nodes.name: 0061_lively_thor_girl.sql
nodes.summary: Adds scheduled retry tracking columns (scheduled_retry_at, scheduled_retry_attempt, scheduled_retry_reason) to the heartbeat_runs table to support deferred retry logic.

nodes.name: 0062_routine_run_dispatch_fingerprint.sql
nodes.summary: Adds dispatch_fingerprint to routine_runs and origin_fingerprint to issues, then rebuilds the routine execution uniqueness index to incorporate fingerprints for more granular deduplication of dispatched routine runs.

nodes.name: 0063_issue_thread_interactions.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the issue_thread_interactions table, capturing structured human-agent interactions within issue threads (approvals, questions, continuation policies) with full actor attribution and resolution tracking.

nodes.name: issue_thread_interactions
nodes.summary: Records structured interactions on issue threads (e.g., agent approval requests, user responses), tracking kind, status, continuation policy, associated run, actor attribution for both creation and resolution, and full payload/result.

nodes.name: 0064_issue_thread_interaction_idempotency.sql
nodes.summary: Adds a unique index on issue_thread_interactions to enforce idempotency by preventing duplicate interactions for the same company, issue, and idempotency key combination.

nodes.name: 0065_environments.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the environments and environment_leases tables, establishing the execution environment management subsystem with support for pluggable drivers, lease lifecycle tracking, and linkage to issues and heartbeat runs.

nodes.name: environments
nodes.summary: Defines execution environments with configurable drivers, storing name, description, driver type, status, config, and metadata per company.

nodes.name: environment_leases
nodes.summary: Tracks active and historical leases on execution environments, linking each lease to an environment, execution workspace, issue, and heartbeat run with full lifecycle timestamps and cleanup status.

nodes.name: 0066_issue_tree_holds.sql
nodes.summary: Creates issue_tree_holds and issue_tree_hold_members tables, implementing a mechanism to pause entire issue subtrees with actor attribution, release policy, and per-member status snapshots for coordinated hold/release operations.

nodes.name: issue_tree_holds
nodes.summary: Represents a hold placed on an issue tree rooted at root_issue_id, tracking mode, status, reason, release policy, and full actor attribution for both creation and release events.

nodes.name: issue_tree_hold_members
nodes.summary: Snapshots individual issues within an issue tree hold, capturing depth, parent linkage, assignment, active run, and skip status at the time the hold was created.

nodes.name: 0067_agent_default_environment.sql
nodes.summary: Adds a default_environment_id foreign key to the agents table, allowing each agent to be assigned a preferred execution environment by default.

nodes.name: 0068_environment_local_driver_unique.sql
nodes.summary: Replaces the environments company/driver index with a partial unique index ensuring only one local-driver environment can exist per company.

nodes.name: 0069_liveness_recovery_dedupe.sql
nodes.summary: Adds two partial unique indexes on the issues table to deduplicate liveness recovery incident and leaf issues by origin kind, id, and fingerprint, preventing concurrent duplicate recovery runs.

nodes.name: 0070_active_run_output_watchdog.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions table and adds supporting indexes to heartbeat_runs, implementing a watchdog subsystem that records snooze/action decisions for stale agent runs.

nodes.name: heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions
nodes.summary: Records watchdog evaluation decisions for individual heartbeat runs, capturing the decision type, snooze deadline, reason, and full actor attribution (agent, user, or run).

nodes.name: 0071_default_hire_approval_off.sql
nodes.summary: Changes the default value of the require_board_approval_for_new_agents column on companies to false, disabling mandatory hire approval by default.

nodes.name: 0072_large_sandman.sql
nodes.summary: Adds a partial unique index on issues for stranded issue recovery deduplication, ensuring only one active recovery issue exists per origin kind/id combination.

nodes.name: 0073_shiny_salo.sql
nodes.summary: Adds the attachment_max_bytes column to the companies table with a default of 10 MB (10485760 bytes), enabling per-company attachment size limits.

nodes.name: 0074_striped_genesis.sql
nodes.summary: Adds a partial unique index on issues to deduplicate productivity review issues, ensuring only one active productivity review issue exists per origin kind/id combination.

nodes.name: 0075_cultured_sebastian_shaw.sql
nodes.summary: Adds monitor scheduling columns (monitor_next_check_at, monitor_wake_requested_at, monitor_last_triggered_at, monitor_attempt_count, monitor_notes, monitor_scheduled_by) to the issues table and creates a covering index for efficient monitor due-date queries.

nodes.name: 0076_useful_elektra.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the plugin_managed_resources table, allowing plugins to register and manage external resources (by kind and key) with default config, with a unique constraint per company/plugin/resource combination.

nodes.name: plugin_managed_resources
nodes.summary: Tracks external resources managed by plugins, identified by plugin key, resource kind, and resource key, with optional defaults JSON for provisioning configuration.

nodes.name: 0077_unusual_karnak.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the routine_revisions table and backfills initial revisions from existing routines, establishing a versioned snapshot history for routines with full actor attribution and self-referential restore tracking.

nodes.name: routine_revisions
nodes.summary: Stores versioned snapshots of routines as immutable revisions, supporting change summaries, restore-from-revision linkage, and full actor attribution (agent, user, or run) for audit trail and rollback.

nodes.name: 0078_white_darwin.sql
nodes.summary: Adds author_type, presentation, and metadata columns to issue_comments, enabling typed comment authorship and rich presentation metadata for agent-authored comments.

nodes.name: 0079_company_search_document_indexes.sql
nodes.summary: Creates GIN trigram indexes on documents.title and documents.latest_body to enable fast fuzzy full-text search across document content.

nodes.name: 0080_company_search_fuzzystrmatch.sql
nodes.summary: Installs the PostgreSQL fuzzystrmatch extension to enable phonetic and fuzzy string matching algorithms (Soundex, Levenshtein, Metaphone) for company search features.

nodes.name: 0081_optimal_dormammu.sql
nodes.summary: Adds the work_mode column to the issues table with a default value of 'standard', enabling per-issue work mode configuration for future execution mode differentiation.

nodes.name: 0082_dry_vision.sql
nodes.summary: Creates company_secret_bindings and secret_access_events tables, implementing the secrets management subsystem with binding of secrets to agents/plugins, version selectors, required flags, and a complete audit log of secret access events.

nodes.name: company_secret_bindings
nodes.summary: Binds company secrets to specific targets (agents, plugins, etc.) with config path mapping, version selector, required flag, and human-readable label for secret injection management.

nodes.name: secret_access_events
nodes.summary: Immutable audit log of every secret access event, capturing secret id, version, provider, actor (type and id), consumer (type and id), associated issue/run/plugin, and outcome for compliance and debugging.
